LanguageData.WB_Giver_KumachanVacsuitHelmet.label: bearly vacsuit helmet
LanguageData.WB_Giver_KumachanVacsuitHelmet.descripti: a three-piece set favored by Givers: the adorable bearly vacsuit helmet, the bearly cylinder, and the oxygen ribbon brooch. With these, even outer space feels like a walk in the park.\nAnyone can wear them, but beware—they’re extremely fragile.\nAfter all, they only barely hold up… but that’s what makes them bearly cute.
